name: clever-comebacks
description: The one-sentence comeback you would have thought of three hours later. A free Claude Code skill, distributed as a single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: clever-comebacks
plugins.description: Paste a mean message, pick a tier (soft, medium, heavy, trainwreck), get one clever sentence back. The single-sentence comeback you would have thought of three hours later — now, while it still matters.
